title: Low back pain - acute
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Acute low back pain often improves with conservative care.
Gentle activity is preferred over prolonged bed rest.
Ice and heat can be used for symptom relief.
Return precautions should include neurologic deficits, bowel or bladder problems, fever, trauma, and worsening severe pain.
